schedule.description: STORY 1: Game recap — Reds 4, Cubs 0 (Greene 12 K)
STORY 2: Game 2 preview — Assad vs Lodolo
STORY 3: Bold take — 16 Ks, offense wake-up call
STORY 6: Pre-game hype — All-Star break approach

stories.title: Reds 4, Cubs 0 — Game 1 Recap (Hunter Greene 12 K)
stories.angle: NEW STORY — Hunter Greene (fresh off 8-ER disaster in his July 4 season debut) came back six days later and shut the Cubs out cold — 12 K, 7 innings, 3 hits. Three Reds pitchers combined for a season-high 16 Cubs strikeouts. Imanaga took the L. Cubs' 9th shutout loss of 2026.

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Hunter Greene allowed 8 ER in his season debut 6 days ago.

Last night he was UNTOUCHABLE — 12 K in 7 innings. Three Reds pitchers combined to strike us out 16 times. Cubs' 9th shutout loss.

Assad gets the ball tonight. 6:10 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Game 2 Preview — Assad vs Lodolo, 6:10 PM CT
stories.angle: NEW STORY — Javier Assad (6-1, 4.04 ERA), the rotation anchor through a first half riddled with injuries, takes the ball tonight vs Nick Lodolo (4.68 ERA). Bounce-back game before the All-Star break. Cubs need this one.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Javier Assad answers tonight in Cincinnati.

6-1, 4.04 ERA. Rotation anchor all first half with Taillon, Boyd, and Cabrera sidelined.

Nick Lodolo (4.68 ERA) is a rebound opportunity. Cubs need this before the break.

6:10 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Bold Take — Cubs Offense 16-K Wake-Up Call
stories.angle: NEW STORY — The contrast between Greene's July 4 implosion (8 ER in 3.1 IP) and his July 10 gem (12 K, 0 R, 7 IP vs Cubs) makes for a stark wake-up call. 9 shutout losses. Season-high 16 Ks. The offense needs to answer.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Hunter Greene was an 8-ER disaster in his season debut on July 4.

Six days later he threw 7 shutout innings against us — 12 K, 3 hits, zero runs.

A season-high 16 Cubs strikeouts. The 9th shutout loss of 2026. The offense needs a wake-up call.

#Cubs #MLB #GoCubs

stories.title: Wild Card Standings — Cubs Now Tied at 52-42
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP — After last night's loss, Cubs dropped from WC1 leaders to a three-way tie with Phillies and Marlins (all 52-42). Every game before the break carries WC seeding weight.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
After last night's loss, the Wild Card picture:

52-42. Cubs are TIED with the Phillies and Marlins for all three NL Wild Card spots.

Hold them steady tonight. Win the break. Win the second half.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Iowa Cubs 21-7 + Jayden Murray Acquisition
stories.angle: NEW STORY — Two pieces of minor league/roster good news: Iowa Cubs torched St. Paul 21-7 on Friday, and Cubs just grabbed RHP Jayden Murray from the Astros (1.17 ERA, 6 saves at Triple-A). The pipeline is delivering.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Good news from Friday:

Iowa Cubs exploded for 21 runs, beat the St. Paul Saints 21-7.

Also: Cubs just acquired RHP Jayden Murray from the Astros — 1.17 ERA and 6 saves at Triple-A. Bullpen reinforcements are incoming.

The pipeline is doing its job.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Pre-Game Hype — 3 Days to All-Star Break
stories.angle: NEW STORY — Three days until PCA heads to Philadelphia for the All-Star Game. But first, two more games to win. Cubs are tied in the Wild Card. Tonight matters.

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Three days until PCA heads to Philadelphia for the All-Star Game.

But first — two more games. Cubs are tied for the Wild Card. Assad on the mound tonight. Cincinnati. 6:10 PM CT.

Take care of business this weekend.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
